channel.title: Royal Vault: Palace Intrigue & Executions in 60 Seconds
channel.description: Every throne has a body count. Beheadings, poisonings, betrayals and executions — the dark secrets behind history's most powerful dynasties. New royal secret every day.
channel.itunes:author: Royal Vault
channel.itunes:summary: Every throne has a body count. Beheadings, poisonings, betrayals and executions — the dark secrets behind history's most powerful dynasties.
